topics: Introduction to Numerical Methods - Errors in Numerical Computation, System of Linear Algebraic Equations - Ill-Conditioned Systems - Symmetric and Banded Systems. Elimination Methods - Gauss Elimination
Factorization Method - Choleski's Method. System of Non-Linear Equations - Newton-Raphson Method. Eigen Value Problems - Largest and Smallest Eigen Values - Power Method
Spline Interpolation - Quadratic and Cubic Splines (Example of Equal Intervals). Data Smoothing by Least Squares Criterion - Non-Polynomial Models like Exponential Model and Power Equation
Multiple Linear Regression. Numerical Integration - Newton-Cotes Open Quadrature Formulae
Solution of First-Order Ordinary Differential Equations - Stability of Solution
Fourth Order Runge-Kutta Method. Higher Order Equations of Initial Value Type by Runge-Kutta Method. Ordinary Differential Equations of the Boundary Value Type - Finite Difference Solution
Partial Differential Equations in Two-Dimension - Types

Laplace Equation and Poisson's Equation. Parabolic Equations - Explicit Finite Difference Method - Bender-Schmidt Method. Crank-Nicholson Implicit Method. Elliptic Equations - Finite Difference Method. Weighted Residual Methods for Initial Value Problems and Boundary Value Problems - Collocation Method
Galerkin's Method. Applications of the Methods shall be based on Civil Engineering Problems such as Structural Analysis Problems to Determine Member Forces
